-- set colors
local COLOR_HEADER = colors.yellow
local COLOR_SUBHEADER = colors.cyan
local COLOR_BODY = colors.white
local COLOR_ACCENT = colors.lime
local COLOR_BG = colors.black


-- setup
local monitor = peripheral.find("monitor")

monitor.setBackgroundColor(COLOR_BG)
monitor.setTextScale(1.3)
monitor.clear()

local monW, monH = monitor.getSize()

-- Basic functions (do not edit)

-- centered line of text
local function writeCentered(text, row, textColor)
	local textLen = #text
	local col = math.floor((monW - textLen) /2) + 1
	monitor.setCursorPos(col, row)
	monitor.setTextColor(textColor or COLOR_BODY)
	monitor.write(text)
end

-- divider
local function drawDivider(char, row, textColor)
	char = char or "-"
	monitor.setCursorPos(1, row)
	monitor.setTextColor(textColor or COLOR_BODY)
	monitor.write(string.rep(char, monW))
end

-- empty row
local function drawClearRow(row)
	monitor.setCursorPos(1, row)
	monitor.clearLine()
end


-- header function
local function writeHeader(text, row)
	writeCentered(text, row, COLOR_HEADER)
end

-- subheader function
local function writeSubheader(text, row)
	writeCentered(text, row, COLOR_SUBHEADER)
end

-- body function
local function writeBody(text, row)
	writeCentered(text, row, COLOR_BODY)
end

-- accent function
local function writeAccent(text, row)
	writeCentered(text, row, COLOR_ACCENT)
end

-- text (editable)

-- header template
writeHeader("Hello, I'm am a Header!", 1)

-- divider template
drawDivider("-", 2, COLOR_HEADER)

-- subheader template
writeSubheader("Hello, I'm an Subheader", 3)

-- empty row template
drawClearRow(4)

-- body template
writeBody("Hello, I'm is Body", 5)

-- accent template
writeAccent("Bello, Me Accent", 6)
